description_full:
Given an integer array nums that may contain duplicates, return all possible subsets (the power set).

The solution set must not contain duplicate subsets. Return the solution in any order.

 
Example 1:
Input: nums = [1,2,2]
Output: [[],[1],[1,2],[1,2,2],[2],[2,2]]
Example 2:
Input: nums = [0]
Output: [[],[0]]

 
Constraints:


	1 <= nums.length <= 10
	-10 <= nums[i] <= 10
description:
Given an integer array nums that may contain duplicates, return all possible subsets (the power set).

The solution set must not contain duplicate subsets. Return the solution in any order.

subtasks.intent: Sort the input array to group identical elements, which simplifies the process of handling duplicates during subset generation.
Use a backtracking algorithm to recursively generate all unique subsets, ensuring duplicate elements are handled correctly to avoid redundant subsets.
